description: Stable affinity plus delay run failed because delay flag patch was reverted

asi.hypothesis: Retest stable affinity keys together with 15s propagation delay.
asi.rollback_reason: Benchmark crashed before model calls: autoresearch.sh still passed --delay-ms but the probe change adding --delay-ms had been reverted by the prior discard.
asi.next_action_hint: Make the probe delay support part of the kept baseline instrumentation, or avoid changing autoresearch.sh until the probe flag exists.

description: Delayed baseline probe showed warmed cache hit but result is not attributable to a kept provider change

asi.hypothesis: A delayed two-session run might reveal that cache materialization, not request shape, is the main issue.
asi.rollback_reason: The run was not attributable to a provider implementation change: autoresearch.sh did not forward --stable-affinity to the probe, and the high hit likely came from previously warmed identical prompt content. Treat as diagnostic evidence, not an optimization to keep.
asi.next_action_hint: Make benchmark flags explicit and reliable, then implement a provider-local stable affinity key and run a clean A/B where the command actually exercises the intended variant.

description: Stable Codex prompt cache affinity key with 15s propagation delay

asi.hypothesis: Provider-local stable prompt cache key and stable SSE affinity headers should let fresh Pi sessions share the reusable Codex prompt prefix once the cache has materialized.
asi.diagnosis: Live two-session probe with 15s delay improved first_request_hit_rate from 0 to 0.945. Both requests reported cacheRead=8448/input=492, showing cross-session hits when affinity is stable.
asi.next_action_hint: Run focused checks for the modified live probe and provider TypeScript. Add changelog entry only for the provider implementation, not autoresearch instrumentation.
